Package i5.cb.telos.frame

Class AttrCategories

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.ShallowCloneable
      • i5.cb.telos.frame.ShallowCloneableNode
        • i5.cb.telos.frame.ImmutableList
          • i5.cb.telos.frame.AttrCategories
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    AST_Node, java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable

    public final class AttrCategories
extends ImmutableList
    List of attribute categories (labels)
    immutable
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

      • AttrCategories

        public AttrCategories​()
        creates an empty list of attribute categories (Labels)

        public AttrCategories​(java.util.Enumeration enumCategories)

    • Method Detail

      • writeTelos

        public void writeTelos​(java.io.DataOutputStream os)
                throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: AST_Node
        writes the text representation of this object (node and subnodes) in 'Plain Aachen' syntax. Writing into an OutputStream is *much* more efficient than recursively constructing a String. To write into a String, do the following:

        ByteArrayOutputStream bos = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
        DataOutputStream dos = new DataOutputStream( bos );
        frames.writeTelos( dos );
        String s = bos.toString();
        Parameters:
        os - the OutputStream to write into
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
        See Also:
        AST_Node.writeTelos( DataOutputStream )

      • appendedBy

        public AttrCategories appendedBy​(Label labCategory)
        append the list with the given category
        Parameters:
        labCategory - the category (as Label) to be appended
        Returns:
        a clone of this, appended by labCategory

      • toSMLFragment

        public java.lang.String toSMLFragment​()

        toSMLFragment in interface AST_Node
        Overrides:
        toSMLFragment in class ImmutableList
